'''dakuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zebrawood|zebrawood]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-k-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zebrawood|zebrawood]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dakuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dækikith|dækikith]] || [[word:dækikij|dækikij]] || [[word:dækikish|dækikish]] || [[word:dækiki|dækiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dakukukuth|dakukukuth]] || [[word:dakukukuj|dakukukuj]] || [[word:dakukukush|dakukukush]] || [[word:dakukuku|dakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dakukuth|dakukuth]] || [[word:dakukuj|dakukuj]] || [[word:dakukush|dakukush]] || [[word:dakuku|dakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dakufkuth|dakufkuth]] || [[word:dakufkuj|dakufkuj]] || [[word:dakufkush|dakufkush]] || [[word:dakufkuf|dakufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dakukuthu|dakukuthu]] || [[word:dakukuju|dakukuju]] || [[word:dakukushu|dakukushu]] || [[word:dakukuku|dakukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dakukuth|dakukuth]] || [[word:dakukuj|dakukuj]] || [[word:dakukush|dakukush]] || [[word:dakuku|dakuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dakukuthul|dakukuthul]] || [[word:dakukujul|dakukujul]] || [[word:dakukushul|dakukushul]] || [[word:dakukukul|dakukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dakukuthuthu|dakukuthuthu]] || [[word:dakukujuju|dakukujuju]] || [[word:dakukushushu|dakukushushu]] || [[word:dakukuku|dakukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dakukuthun|dakukuthun]] || [[word:dakukujun|dakukujun]] || [[word:dakukushun|dakukushun]] || [[word:dakukukun|dakukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dakukuthuoro|dakukuthuoro]] || [[word:dakukujuoro|dakukujuoro]] || [[word:dakukushuoro|dakukushuoro]] || [[word:dakukukuoro|dakukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
